title: Finance
moreFeaturesDescription: Additional finance management tools and utilities

invoicing.title: Invoicing
invoicing.details: Create professional invoices, track payments, and manage client billing.

receipts.title: Receipts
receipts.details: Generate receipts, scan expenses with AI OCR, and track all transactions.

banking.title: Banking
banking.details: Connect bank accounts, track transactions, manage transfers, and reconcile.

fees.title: Student Fees
fees.description: Fee structures and student payment tracking
fees.details: Manage fee structures, track student payments, handle scholarships and fines.

salary.title: Salary Management
salary.details: Define salary structures, manage allowances and deductions, calculate pay.

payroll.title: Payroll Processing
payroll.description: Payroll runs and salary slip generation
payroll.details: Process payroll, generate salary slips, calculate taxes, and handle disbursements.

timesheet.title: Timesheets
timesheet.details: Track staff hours, approve timesheets, calculate overtime, and integrate with payroll.

wallet.title: Wallet Management
wallet.details: Manage school wallet, track parent wallet balances, and handle top-ups.

budget.title: Budget Planning
budget.details: Create budgets, allocate funds by department, track spending, and analyze variance.

expenses.title: Expense Management
expenses.details: Submit expenses, manage approval workflow, track reimbursements, and categorize.

accounts.title: Accounting System
accounts.details: Manage chart of accounts, journal entries, general ledger, and period closing.

reports.title: Financial Reports
reports.details: Generate P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, Trial Balance, and custom reports.

workflow.title: Finance Workflow Guide
workflow.description: Step-by-step guide to managing school finances

1.title: Set Up Accounting System
1.description: Configure your chart of accounts, fiscal year, and connect bank accounts.

2.title: Configure Fee Structures
2.description: Define student fee structures, payment plans, scholarships, and fines.

3.title: Set Up Staff Salary
3.description: Create salary structures with allowances and deductions for all staff members.

4.title: Track Revenue & Expenses
4.description: Monitor student payments, process invoices, approve expenses, and reconcile banks.

5.title: Process Payroll Monthly
5.description: Review timesheets, calculate salaries, generate slips, and process disbursements.

6.title: Generate Financial Reports
6.description: Create P&L statements, balance sheets, cash flow reports, and analyze performance.
